title: CAM, Trilegal act on SEDEMAC Mechatronics ~₹1,087 crore IPO
description: SEDEMAC Mechatronics Limited has made an initial public offering of equity shares aggregating to ₹1,087.35 crore, which comprised an offer for sale of 8,043,300 equity shares.Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas advised SEDEMAC on this IPO.The transaction team was led by Manan Lahoty (Partner & Head - Capital Markets) and Anshul Roy (Partner), with support from Rishav Buxi (Principal Associate) and Associates Anuj Gupta, Niharika Payannavar, Hitesh Nagpal, Aditya Maheshwari and Chinmay Jumde.Manan Laho
